name: Ridgeline Builders

name: Wake Technical Community College
description: North Carolina's largest community college. Apprenticeship and skilled trades programs including carpentry and building construction.

description: General contractor handling residential and light commercial renovations across the Triangle.

name: Capitol City Lumber Company
description: Family-owned lumber and hardwood supplier serving Raleigh contractors and woodworkers since 1954.

name: Lie-Nielsen Toolworks
description: Heirloom-quality hand planes, saws, and edge tools made in Maine for woodworkers and furniture makers.

name: Woodcraft
description: Retailer of woodworking tools, hardwood, and supplies with stores across the country and a location in Raleigh.

name: Rockler Woodworking and Hardware
description: Woodworking tools, hardware, and jigs. Known for router tables, clamps, and shop accessories.

name: Festool USA
description: German-engineered power tools and dust extraction systems for professional trades and finish carpenters.

name: DeWalt
description: Professional-grade power tools, cordless systems, and jobsite equipment for the building trades.

name: Milwaukee Tool
description: Heavy-duty power tools, hand tools, and jobsite storage built for professional tradespeople.

description: Domestic and exotic hardwood lumber supplier serving North Carolina woodworkers and cabinet shops.

name: Klingspor's Woodworking Shop
description: Raleigh woodworking store carrying abrasives, tools, and supplies for hobbyists and professionals.

name: The Home Depot
description: Home improvement retailer supplying building materials, tools, and hardware to pros and homeowners.

name: Associated General Contractors of North Carolina
description: Trade association representing commercial and residential builders across North Carolina.

name: North Carolina Home Builders Association
description: Statewide association supporting residential builders, remodelers, and the housing trades in North Carolina.

name: Marchetti Electric
description: Licensed residential and commercial electrical contractor serving the Raleigh and Garner area.

name: Holloway Custom Woodworks
description: Custom cabinetry, built-ins, and furniture shop building for homeowners and designers around the Triangle.

name: Triangle Custom Homes
